appDesc.message: This extension syncs YouTube live streams in real-time by accelerating viewer-delayed streams caused by data reception delays.

tagline.message: Keep YouTube live streams in real time

modesNote.message: Speeds up only enough to cut latency, then rests at 1.0x (which holds the latency). Less buffer = closer to live, but needs a better connection.

modeAutoDesc.message: Analyzes your connection and adjusts itself: closer to live when your internet can take it, more buffer when it wavers.

modeBalancedDesc.message: A good middle ground: low latency while keeping ~4s of buffer.

modeAggressiveDesc.message: Very close to live, with ~3s of buffer. Needs stable internet.

modeExtremeDesc.message: Right at the live edge, with only ~2s of buffer. Only for very fast, stable internet — may stutter.

modePersonalizadoDesc.message: You set the target buffer (1 to 6s). Because it slows below 1.0x to rebuild the cushion, it can hold tighter targets than the other modes. Less buffer = closer to live, but may stall.

showBadge.message: Show latency on the toolbar icon

resetHint.message: Press and hold for 1 second to reset.

supportNote.message: Enjoying the extension? Support its development with a small donation.

supportScan.message: Scan with your bank app, or copy the code:

donateNudge.message: Enjoying ZeroDelay? If it helps you, consider supporting it with a coffee — entirely optional. 🙂

donateBannerText.message: Enjoying ZeroDelay? Support it with a coffee.

stallDesc.message: A lighter mode keeps more buffer and steadies it.

channelMemoryHint.message: Saves the mode you pick on each channel and reapplies it when you return.

supportCtaText.message: Enjoying it? Buy me a coffee 🙏

a11yEstimation.message: Estimated time to catch up to live

a11yCurrent.message: Current time (click to copy the link)

faqWhatA.message: On YouTube live streams with DVR, the player often falls behind live. ZeroDelay speeds up playback a little to bring you back to real time, then returns to normal once it catches up.

faqStartA.message: Pick a mode in the popup. Automatic is recommended: it measures your connection and adjusts itself.

faqSpeedQ.message: Why does the speed change on its own?

faqSpeedA.message: That's catch-up: while you're behind live, the speed rises (up to ~1.25x) to use up the buffer; once you catch up, it returns to 1.0x.

faqModeA.message: Less buffer keeps you closer to live but needs a better connection. When in doubt, use Automatic, which adapts to your connection.

faqIndicatorsQ.message: What are the numbers on the player?

faqIndicatorsA.message: Next to the LIVE badge you'll see the current speed, the latency (how far behind you are) and the buffer health. You can turn each one on or off in the indicators section.

faqShortcutsA.message:
Two shortcuts (on Mac, swap Alt for ⌘ Command):
• Alt+Shift+Y — turn ZeroDelay on/off
• Alt+Shift+L — jump to live
You can view and change them at chrome://extensions/shortcuts.
